name: ruby-winrm
title: ruby-winrm
summary: Ruby library for Windows Remote Management
description:
Ruby library for Windows Remote Management
This package contains a SOAP library that uses the functionality in Windows
Remote Management(WinRM) to call native object in Windows. This includes, but
is not limited to, running batch scripts, powershell scripts and fetching WMI
variables.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use rwinrm because Ruby library for Windows Remote Management.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use rwinrm as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `rwinrm [options] [args]` as documented upstream for rwinrm.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair rwinrm with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `rwinrm --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
